dns.description: This setting defines the maximum number of entries that may be stored in the DNS cache before the oldest entry is evicted.
When enabled, the TTL of each entry will be overridden with the value defined in resolve.ttl.override.
Number of seconds to override the TTL with. When set to 0, the TTL will expire directly
This setting enables the local DNS override table. When enabled, Gosub will return any IP address that is defined in the local DNS override table.
This setting defines the local DNS override table.
This setting enabled DNS over HTTPS. A secure way of communicating with DNS servers.
This setting enabled DNS over TLS. A secure way of communicating with DNS servers.
Any resolvers defined here will be used for DNS lookups. If no resolvers are defined, the system resolvers will be used.
How many times to retry a DNS lookup before giving up.
How many seconds to wait for a DNS lookup to complete before giving up.
When enabled, Gosub will use the hosts file to resolve hostnames as well.

net.description: Default User-Agent string sent with outgoing HTTP requests.
TCP+TLS handshake timeout (seconds) before request bytes are sent.
Timeout (seconds) from sending the first request byte until response headers arrive.
Maximum silence (seconds) between consecutive response body chunks before timing out.
Wall-clock deadline (seconds) for receiving the entire response body. 0 disables the limit.
Maximum number of concurrent HTTP connections across all origins.
Maximum concurrent HTTP/1.x connections per origin.
Maximum concurrent HTTP/2 streams per origin.
Maximum number of HTTP redirects to follow before giving up.
Enable HTTP/2 support.
Enable HTTP/3 support (if the backend supports it).
Maximum response body size (bytes) for synchronous HTTP operations.
Persist cookies to disk between sessions.
Cookie partitioning policy.
How third-party cookies are handled.
Maximum on-disk HTTP cache size in bytes (default 512 MB).
Maximum in-memory HTTP cache size in bytes (default 128 MB).
Enforce CORS policies on cross-origin requests.
List of domains to block (exact match).
List of explicitly allowed domains (exact match). Empty means no allowlist.
Proxy URL for HTTP requests (e.g. http://user:pass@host:port). Empty disables.
Proxy URL for HTTPS requests. Empty disables.
SOCKS5 proxy URL (e.g. socks5://host:1080). Empty disables.
List of domains that bypass the proxy.
Use the system root certificate store for TLS validation.

renderer.description: When set to true, the OpenGL renderer will be used. When set to false, the software renderer will be used.
Square tile dimension (pixels) used by the rasterization grid.
Background color (#rrggbbaa) used to clear the surface before compositing.
Frame-rate cap in FPS. 0 means uncapped.
Snap rendering coordinates to pixel boundaries for sharper text.
Use an sRGB framebuffer if supported.
Prefer a low-power (integrated) GPU on multi-GPU systems.
DPI resolution used for font rendering (CSS px to point conversion).

engine.description: Maximum number of zones that may be created within the engine.
Maximum number of tabs allowed within a single zone.
Engine worker thread-pool size. 0 means auto-detect from CPU cores.
Maximum number of concurrent network/disk I/O tasks.
Maximum number of concurrent script (JS/WASM) tasks.
Default buffer capacity for the engine's async command/event channels.
Grace period (seconds) for the I/O thread to shut down cleanly.
Per-zone storage quota in bytes (localStorage, IndexedDB; default 256 MB).
Maximum font cache size in bytes (default 64 MB).
SQLite busy timeout in milliseconds for concurrent access.
Maximum number of pooled SQLite connections.

scripting.description: Maximum CPU time (milliseconds) scripts may use per frame.
